## 简介

对抗验证层优化：Prompt 优化（Few-Shot、角色专业化、链式思考、置信度校准）+ 多轮对抗机制（按需触发、反驳逻辑、最多 3 轮）+ 65 个单元/集成/端到端测试

## 功能变更

| 功能 | 操作 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| Prompt 优化 | 增强 | Few-Shot 示例 + 角色专业化 + 链式思考 + 置信度校准 |
| 多轮对抗 | 新增 | 按需触发辩论，最多 3 轮 |
| 反驳机制 | 新增 | attacker.rebut\(\) + defender.rebut\(\) |
| 触发条件 | 新增 | NEEDS_REVIEW / strength_diff < 0.2 / confidence < 0.6 |
| 测试覆盖 | 新增 | 65 个单元/集成/端到端测试 |

## 关联目标

- 目标：优化对抗验证层：Prompt优化 + 按需多轮对抗
- 状态：completed

from src.layers.l3_analysis.scoring.scorers.codeql_scorer import CodeQLScorer
from src.layers.l3_analysis.models import Finding, SeverityLevel, CodeLocation

finding = Finding\(
    id='test',
    rule_id='py/sql-injection',
    type='vulnerability',
    severity=SeverityLevel.HIGH,
    confidence=0.9,
    title='Test',
    description='Test',
    location=CodeLocation\(file='app.py', line=42, function='get_user'\),
\)

codeql_dataflow = {
    'has_source': True,
    'has_sink': True,
    'has_sanitizer': False,
    'path_length': 3,
}

scorer = CodeQLScorer\(\)
result = scorer.score\(finding, codeql_dataflow\)
print\(f'CodeQL score: {result.score}, confidence: {result.confidence}, available: {result.available}'\)
")

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=/opt/projects/DeepVuln:$PYTHONPATH python -c "
from src.layers.l3_analysis.scoring.scorers.codeql_scorer import CodeQLScorer
from src.layers.l3_analysis.models import Finding, SeverityLevel, CodeLocation

finding = Finding\(
    id='test',
    rule_id='py/sql-injection',
    type='vulnerability',
    severity=SeverityLevel.HIGH,
    confidence=0.9,
    title='Test',
    description='Test',
    source='codeql',
    location=CodeLocation\(file='app.py', line=42, function='get_user'\),
\)

codeql_dataflow = {
    'has_source': True,
    'has_sink': True,
    'has_sanitizer': False,
    'path_length': 3,
}

scorer = CodeQLScorer\(\)
result = scorer.score\(finding, codeql_dataflow\)
print\(f'CodeQL score: {result.score}, confidence: {result.confidence}, available: {result.available}'\)
print\(f'Evidence: {result.evidence}'\)
")
